General.Name: Kidsland International Holdings
General.Description: Kidsland International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, trades in and sells toys and related lifestyle products in Mainland China, Macau, and Hong Kong. It invests in trademarks; and offers baby care products. The company offers its products through retail channels, such as retail shops, consignment counters, and online stores; and wholesale channels, including distributors, hypermarket and supermarket chains, and online key accounts under the Bandai, LOL Surprise, Silverlit, TOMY, Spin Master, FAO Schwarz, LEGO, Qposket, SIKU, Schleich, Trefl, Pic it, Little Tikes, MILU brands, and OXO brands. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
General.Address: Yansha No. 50, Anjialou Road, Beijing, China

1.Name: Ms. Mei  Zhong
